hasAttributes.name: loanApplicationContactId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the Loan Application Contact.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the Loan Application Contact.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Combines and shows the loan application contact's first and last names so that the full name can be displayed in views and reports.

hasAttributes.name: addressLine1
hasAttributes.description: The first line of the loan application contact address.

hasAttributes.name: addressLine2
hasAttributes.description: The second line of the loan application contact address.

hasAttributes.name: addressLine3
hasAttributes.description: The third line of the loan application contact address.

hasAttributes.name: assetsLiabilitiesVerificationStatus
hasAttributes.description: The verification status of the assets and liabilities of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: birthday
hasAttributes.description: The birthday of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: city
hasAttributes.description: The city of the loan application contact's present address.

hasAttributes.name: contact
hasAttributes.description: The contact associated with the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: contactVerificationStatus
hasAttributes.description: The verification status of the contact.

hasAttributes.name: countryRegion
hasAttributes.description: The country or region for the loan application contact's present address.

hasAttributes.name: county
hasAttributes.description: The county for the loan contact's present address.

hasAttributes.name: creditCheck
hasAttributes.description: The credit check associated with the loan applicant.

hasAttributes.name: dependents
hasAttributes.description: Number of dependents associated with the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: dependentsYears
hasAttributes.description: List of ages of the dependents of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: donotallowEmails
hasAttributes.description: Shows that the loan application contact does not want to receive emails.

hasAttributes.name: donotallowTextMessages
hasAttributes.description: Shows that the loan application contact does not want to receive text messages.

hasAttributes.name: email
hasAttributes.description: The primary email address of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: firstname
hasAttributes.description: The first name of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: gender
hasAttributes.description: The gender of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: governmentId
hasAttributes.description: The passport number or other government ID of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: isBorrowerEmployerRelationship
hasAttributes.description: Indicates whether the borrower is employed by a family member, the property seller, the real estate agent/broker, or other party related to the application.

hasAttributes.name: KYC
hasAttributes.description: The Know Your Customer record associated with this loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: lastName
hasAttributes.description: The last name of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: loanApplicationID
hasAttributes.description: The unique identifier of the loan application connected to the customer.

hasAttributes.name: loanApplicationRole
hasAttributes.description: Describes the role of the contact in the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: loansinthepast90days
hasAttributes.description: Number of loans the Loan Application Contact has applied for in the previous 90 days.

hasAttributes.name: maritalStatus
hasAttributes.description: Select the marital status of the loan application contact for reference in follow-up phone calls and other communications.

hasAttributes.name: middleName
hasAttributes.description: The Loan Application Contact's middle name.

hasAttributes.name: numberofYearsatPresentAddress
hasAttributes.displayName: Number of years at present address
hasAttributes.description: Number of Years at Present Address.

hasAttributes.name: phone
hasAttributes.description: The main phone number of the loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: postOfficeBox
hasAttributes.description: The post office box number of the present address.

hasAttributes.name: prefix
hasAttributes.description: The loan application contact's title (Ms., Mr., Doctor, etc).

hasAttributes.name: presentAddressOwnershipStatus
hasAttributes.description: Does loan contact own or rent their current living address.

hasAttributes.name: primaryMemberHelper
hasAttributes.description: A calculated field helping determine if this loan application contact is the primary member of the loan application.

hasAttributes.name: stateProvince
hasAttributes.description: The state or province of this loan application contact's present address.

hasAttributes.name: yearsSchool
hasAttributes.description: The number of education years for this loan application contact.

hasAttributes.name: ZIPPostalCode
hasAttributes.description: The ZIP Code or postal code of this loan application contact's present address.

hasAttributes.name: isPrimaryBorrower
hasAttributes.description: When true, indicates that the borrower is the primary borrower on the application.

definitions.description: The customer associated with the loan application.
